translations.en: a quiet, pale, almost motionless gentleman.
translations.zh: 一位安靜、面色蒼白、幾乎紋絲不動的紳士。

translations.en: "Ohhh! Silly me, spending so much time with my clients." He gestures at the corpses.
translations.zh: 「哦哦！真是糊塗，花了太多時間陪我的客人。」他向屍體們揮揮手。

translations.en: "I forget little details like paying Mole..."
translations.zh: 「忘了一些細節，比如付錢給鼴鼠……」

translations.en: "I'll have to take care of it right away."
translations.zh: 「我必須馬上處理。」

translations.en: "You deserve a reward for helping me straighten this out."
translations.zh: 「你幫我理清此事，理應得到獎賞。」

translations.en: "That mage over on the table was found just outside of town."
translations.zh: 「桌上那位法師是在城鎮外發現的。」

translations.en: "He was carrying a couple of enchanted items and some money when the gargoyles got him."
translations.zh: 「魔像族抓到他時，他帶著幾件魔法物品和一些錢。」

translations.en: *"Nobody has been able to find any relatives of his, so you might as well take it all."
translations.zh: *「找不到他的任何親屬，所以你不妨把這些都帶走。」

translations.en: "That addle-brained, lower class, miserable excuse for a common laborer..."
translations.zh: 「那個腦袋不靈光、出身低賤、不成材的普通工人……」

translations.en: "I agreed to give him an equipment allowance with his pay."
translations.zh: 「我同意在薪酬中加上設備補貼。」

translations.en: "No doubt it's all been squandered at some tavern, along with the rest of his pay."
translations.zh: 「毫無疑問全都花在某家酒館了，連他其餘的薪水也是。」

translations.en: "See what he has to say about that!"
translations.zh: 「去問問他有何話說！」

translations.en: "So, his shovel broke? That's no excuse."
translations.zh: 「哦，他的鏟子壞了？那不是藉口。」

translations.en: "Tell him he should have bought another one and kept working."
translations.zh: 「告訴他應該再買一把，繼續幹活。」

translations.en: You pass along Mole's message. "Needs a shovel, does he? Tell him to use the one I gave him when I hired him!"
translations.zh: 你轉達了鼴鼠的話。「需要鏟子？叫他用我雇他時給的那把！」

translations.en: "No doubt he's forgotten he has it by now, or lost it somewhere..."
translations.zh: 「毫無疑問他現在已忘記有這把鏟子，或者弄丟在某處……」

translations.en: "Good evening." he says, in a voice that sends shivers down your spine.
translations.zh: 「晚上好。」他說，那嗓音令你脊背發涼。

translations.en: "It is evening, I hope. That's my favorite time."
translations.zh: 「希望是晚上。那是我最喜歡的時刻。」

translations.en: "I am Glen D'Arc, of the @Trinsic D'Arcs."
translations.zh: 「吾乃葛蘭·達爾克，@Trinsic（特林）希克達爾克家族的。」

translations.en: "I had to move away... Too @sunny."
translations.zh: 「吾不得不搬離……太@sunny（陽光）了。」

translations.en: "I much prefer moonlight. It's more natural and healthy."
translations.zh: 「吾更偏愛月光。它更自然、更健康。」

translations.en: "For most clients, I prefer to use Frigid @Solvol."
translations.zh: 「對於大多數客人，吾更喜歡使用冰冷@Solvol（索伏）爾。」

translations.en: "It's the finest enbalming fluid on the market."
translations.zh: 「這是市面上最好的防腐液。」
translations.note: 原文 enbalming 為拼寫錯誤

translations.en: "It gives the departed a nice, healthy glow..."
translations.zh: 「它讓逝者散發出美麗、健康的光澤……」

translations.en: "Yes, those who cannot afford resurrection know the cool comfort of good, honest soil."
translations.zh: 「是的，那些無力復活的人，知道優質誠實泥土的清涼慰藉。」

translations.en: He sighs longingly. "How I envy them, for only the @dead know true peace."
translations.zh: 他深情嘆息。「吾多麼羨慕他們，因為唯有@dead（亡者）才知真正的平靜。」

translations.en: "He smiles. "I see you're not much of a believer in death."
translations.zh: 他微笑。「看來你並不怎麼信仰死亡。」
translations.note: 原文有多餘引號，照意譯

translations.en: "But next time you're dead you should try staying that way. You might like it..."
translations.zh: 「但下次你死去時，不妨試著就那樣待著。也許你會喜歡……」

translations.en: "You can't get good help these days..."
translations.zh: 「現在找個好幫手真難……」

translations.en: "Mole was supposed to have two more graves finished yesterday."
translations.zh: 「鼴鼠昨天應該挖完兩座墳的。」

translations.en: "I can't stand to talk to him any more - if you see him, tell him I need those graves dug immediately!"
translations.zh: 「吾再也受不了跟他說話——若你見到他，告訴他吾立刻需要那些墳挖好！」

translations.en: "Goodbye for now - I'm sure I'll see you again. Every body ends up here sooner or later..."
translations.zh: 「暫別——吾確信會再見到你。每個人遲早都會來這裡的……」

translations.en: "Don't concern yourself with that. Life is too hectic as it is."
translations.zh: 「別為那事費心。生命本就夠忙亂了。」

translations.en: "I prepare the @bodies of the departed for their eternal @rest." He pauses to pop a grape into his mouth.
translations.zh: 「吾為亡者的@bodies（遺體）作永恆@rest（安息）的準備。」他停頓一下，把一顆葡萄塞進嘴裡。

translations.en: He chews it delicately, but you can still hear a soft, squishy sound. "Would you like a few grapes?"
translations.zh: 他細嚼慢嚥，但你仍能聽到一聲輕微的嘎吱聲。「你要幾顆葡萄嗎？」

translations.en: "Help yourself."
translations.zh: 「請自取。」

translations.en: "It's very relaxing work. At least it would be, if I didn't have to put up with that incompetent @gravedigger."
translations.zh: 「這是非常放鬆的工作。至少本該如此，若不是得忍受那個無能的@gravedigger（掘墓人）人的話。」

translations.en: His eyes gleam fiendishly when he notices the body you're carrying.
translations.zh: 他注意到你攜帶的屍體時，眼中閃過邪惡的光芒。

translations.en: "Ah, you've brought me a client. Tell the truth, doesn't your friend look more peaceful this way?"
translations.zh: 「啊，你給我帶來了一位客人。說實話，你的朋友這樣看起來是不是更平靜？」

translations.en: "For such a heroic client, I have something special to offer."
translations.zh: 「對於如此英勇的客人，吾有特別的服務奉上。」

translations.en: "It's a new process I've invented called 'cremation.'"
translations.zh: 「這是吾發明的新工藝，稱為『火葬』。」

translations.en: "For a mere fifteen gold, the remains of the dearly departed are purified with flame."
translations.zh: 「只需區區十五枚金幣，親愛的逝者的遺骸便以烈火淨化。」

translations.en: "Would you like me to do this for you?"
translations.zh: 「你希望吾為你做這個嗎？」

translations.en: "Too bad."
translations.zh: 「太可惜了。」

translations.en: "You're a bit short on gold." he says, disappointedly.
translations.zh: 「你的金幣有點不夠。」他失望地說。

translations.en: "Excellent!" He takes the body, and recites a brief incantation.
translations.zh: 「太好了！」他接過屍體，念了一段簡短的咒語。

translations.en: An eerie green flame engulfs the corpse, consuming it in seconds.
translations.zh: 詭異的綠色火焰將屍體吞噬，眨眼間燒成灰燼。

translations.en: Nothing but ashes remain. The mortician sweeps them up, puts them in an urn, and hands it to
translations.zh: 只剩下灰燼。殯儀師將它們掃起，放入骨灰罐，遞給

translations.en: $Y
translations.zh: $Y

translations.en: you
translations.zh: 你

translations.en: "Please come again if any more of your friends need my services."
translations.zh: 「若你的朋友中還有人需要吾的服務，請再來。」

translator_notes: 葛蘭是陰鬱的殯儀師，喜愛死亡和月光，以文言（「吾」）呈現其老派神秘氣質。黑色幽默貫穿全文。火葬是新功能，用屍體換骨灰罐。
